mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_identity (user_id, user_real_name, id_card_number, id_card_front_url, face_capture_url, verify_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userRealName}, #{idCardNumber}, #{idCardFrontUrl}, #{faceCaptureUrl}, #{verifyStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_identity WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_identity SET verify_status = #{status} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
